case_title: LINH MY LUONG VS. JANIO DE PAULA CARVALHO JR ET. AL.

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO JANIO DE PAULA CARVALHO JR AND CANTARELLI WANDREY BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF NOV-01-2017 AT 10:00 AM. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT CARVALHO ON 11-01-17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LUONG, LINH MY - DRIVER AS TO DEFENDANT CARVALHO JR, JANIO DE PAULA - DRIVER DOORDASH, INC. WANDREY, CANTARELLI - R/O ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-01-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO FEE) SERVED SEP-11-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOORDASH, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT DOORDASH, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-01-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-01-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DOORDASH WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUONG, LINH MY - DRIVER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DOORDASH, INC. AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS AGAINST JANIO DE PAULA CARVALHO, JR. AND CANTARELLI WANDREY ARE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO WANDREY CANTARELLI ON 11-01-17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-01-2017 - JUDGMENT.
